title: Roof Bolters, Mining
description: Operate machinery to install roof support bolts in underground mine.

tasks.text: Drill bolt holes into roofs at specified distances from ribs or adjacent bolts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pull down loose rock that cannot be supported.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position bolting machines, and insert drill bits into chucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform safety checks on equipment before operating.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform tests to determine if methane gas is present.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Force bolts into holes, using hydraulic mechanisms of self-propelled bolting machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform ventilation tasks, such as hanging ventilation curtains and tubes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install various types of bolts, including truss, glue, and resin bolts, traversing entire ceiling spans.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drill test holes and test bolts for specified tension, using torque wrenches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position safety jacks to support underground mine roofs until bolts can be installed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Rotate chucks to turn bolts and open expansion heads against rock formations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove drill bits from chucks after drilling holes, and insert bolts into chucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tighten ends of anchored truss bolts, using turnbuckles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
